case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC. VS. ADELA MACMILLAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100047873), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC. SERVED JUL-08-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MACMILLAN, ADELA
DECLARATION RE: 1) COMPLIANCE WITH CCP SECTION 1033(B)(2) (TRANSACTION ID # 200002501) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC.
DECLARATION OF CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE 1788.60(A) (TRANSACTION ID # 200002501) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MACMILLAN, ADELA $6,884.75 PRINCIPAL, $285.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,169.75, SEE SCANNED DOC

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $285.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 200002501) AS TO DEFENDANT MACMILLAN, ADELA

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 200002501) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 25
